text: The CDC lifted its travel warning for cruises on Wednesday after two years of shifting advisories, lawsuits, and criticism from industry leaders who accused the agency of heavy-handed regulations.

title: Carnival Is Cruising in Troubled Waters
text: Carnival Corp.'s ( CCL , Financial) first-quarter 2022 results failed to meet analysts' expectations, and the reason, it claims, is simple: the Omicron variant of Covid-19 that plagued the travel industry's recovery after the holiday outbreak. The troubles aren't over now that the Omicron wave has begun to subside, though.

text: Carnival Corp (NYSE: CCL) reported first-quarter FY22 revenues of $1.62 billion, missing the consensus of $2.30 billion. It reported revenues of $26 million last year.

title: Carnival's Earnings Missed Estimates as Omicron Hit. Now There's the Ukraine War.
text: The cruise operator said it expects another net loss in the second quarter before returning to profit in the third.

title: Carnival expects to return to profitability this summer
text: Carnival PLC (LSE:CCL), the cruises operator, posted an eye-watering first-quarter loss of US$1,88mln but said it expects to return to profitability this summer. Since the middle of January, the company has seen an improving trend in weekly booking volumes for future sailings and recent weekly booking volumes have been higher than at any point since the restart of guest cruise operations.

title: Carnival posts narrower loss but misses analyst estimates
text: Carnival Corp. CL, -0.39% said Tuesday it lost $1.89 billion, or $1.66 a share in the first quarter, compared to a loss of $1.97 billion, or $1.80 a share, in the year-ago period. Revenue increased to $1.62 billion from $26 million.

title: Carnival sales disappoint as spike in COVID cases hurt cruise demand
text: Carnival Corp on Tuesday missed Wall Street estimates for quarterly revenue, as a rise in COVID-19 infections due to the Omicron variant during the quarter hampered cruise bookings.

title: Carnival Corporation Stock Can Move Up Quickly on Revenue Figures

title: One Way or Another Carnival Cruise Lines Should Be a Compelling Buy
text: Carnival is expected to deliver revenue of $2.3 billion when it reports earnings. That's less than half of its pre-pandemic revenue, and a reminder that it may still be several quarters before CCL stock is firing on all cylinders

title: Shoe Carnival stock rises after profit blows past expectations and dividend raised
text: Shoe Carnival Inc. SCVL, +4.07% shares rose 2.6% in Wednesday premarket trading after it reported fourth-quarter profit that blew past expectations and raised its dividend. The retailer posted net income totaling $20.6 million, or 72 cents per share, up from $7.4 million, or 26 cents per share, last year.
